chapter_title: Permits for Oversize or Overweight Vehicles

markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 623. Permits for Oversize or Overweight Vehicles
##### § 623.304 — Maintenance Contracts

The port authority shall make payments to the Texas Department of Transportation to provide funds for the maintenance of state highways subject to this subchapter.

*Acts 2011, 82nd Leg., R.S., Ch. 1345 (S.B.1420), Sec. 95, eff. September 1, 2011.*

subsections.text: The port authority shall make payments to the Texas Department of Transportation to provide funds for the maintenance of state highways subject to this subchapter.
